justification: This model provides 55B active / 550B total parameter frontier-reasoning and orchestration capabilities within a shared LiteLLM budget envelope. Built on a hybrid Transformer-Mamba mixture-of-experts (MoE) architecture, it is tailored for long-running agentic workflows and complex multi-step planning. The overall $0.50 cap is enforced across cumulative spend, including embedding calls such as Gemini embeddings and Graphiti-related calls. The massive 1M context window effortlessly handles comprehensive security log analysis, deep research, and extensive pentesting strategy planning.
